hero.badge: No bank connection · you upload your statements
hero.sub: We never ask for your bank credentials. Export the statement your online bank already gives you, upload it to fintrack and get all your money in order in seconds — without handing access to anyone.
hero.note: Free forever on the Free plan · no card

marquee.label: Works with your bank’s CSV — with every bank

excel.title: Hasn’t your budgeting spreadsheet been opened in months?
excel.sub: You started it full of good intentions. Then updating it by hand every week got tedious… and you gave up. fintrack updates itself: you upload the statement and you’re done.
excel.pt1: No broken formulas, no manual cells
excel.pt2: Catches up the moment you upload a CSV
excel.pt3: Categories, charts and net worth, automatic

features.title: Meet fintrack.
features.sub: A clear picture of your money that catches itself up every time you upload a statement.
features.f1body: Drag in the statement you export from your online bank. fintrack reads, sorts and classifies it instantly.
features.f2title: We never ask for your credentials
features.f2body: No connection to your bank or third parties. No credentials to hand over, no doubts about what happens to them.
features.f3body: A dictionary, your own rules and the Haiku engine label every transaction for you. You just review.

steps.title: From statement to control in a minute.
steps.s1body: Download the CSV your online bank already offers. Nothing else needed from your bank.
steps.s2body: Drag and drop. We detect duplicates and transfers between your accounts automatically.
steps.s3body: Dashboards, global position and analysis up to date. Never touch a spreadsheet again.

security.title: Your data never leaves your control.
security.sub: Most apps ask for your bank credentials and nobody tells you what they do with them. fintrack doesn’t. You decide what you upload and when — and you can wipe it all in one click.
security.s1d: No connection to your bank. We never ask for a username or password.
security.s2d: Your statements travel and are stored encrypted. Only you see them.
security.s3d: Export or delete all your information whenever you want, no questions asked.

pricing.title: Start free. Grow when you want.
pricing.sub: Three tiers. The Free plan is free forever and asks for no card.

free.name: FREE
free.desc: To start tidying up your money

pro.name: PRO
pro.desc: For those who check it often

cta.title: Your finances, without giving up your data.
cta.sub: Upload your first statement today. Free, no card and no credentials for anyone.
cta.note: Set up in under a minute
